payload.answer: This looks like a new additive memory candidate about Sam from Goldman liking Bill Evans. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Add as a separate memory: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
Keep both this fact and any existing Sam-related memories, without merging unless you confirm they refer to the same Sam.
